Application Fee

  • SC / ST : 400/-

  • Last Date to Download: March 1, 2026 (till 6:00 PM)

Final Result Declaration January 15, 2026

Direct Link to Check SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Candidates can access the SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 through the direct link on the SSC portal under the “Result/Marks” section after logging in. The portal may redirect from legacy links, but use ssc.gov.in primarily.

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 – Direct Link (Active)
(Login required at ssc.gov.in for marks download)

Step-by-Step Guide to Download SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  1. Visit the official Staff Selection Commission website: ssc.gov.in.
  2. Click on the “Login” or “Candidate Login” button on the homepage.
  3. Enter your registration number/username, password, and captcha (if prompted).
  4. After logging in, navigate to the “Result/Marks” tab on your dashboard.
  5. Select “Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA and Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles Examination 2025” from the list.
  6. Click on the “SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025” or “Marks” link to view your details.
  7. Your final scorecard will display on screen - review marks, cut-off comparison, and status.
  8. Download the PDF and print it for future reference (e.g., document verification). Save it promptly, as access ends after the deadline.
  9. (Use the direct link mentioned above to reach the login faster if available.)

Details Mentioned on SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Your scorecard typically includes:

  • Candidate’s name, roll number, registration number
  • Category/sub-category (UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, etc.)
  • Exam name and applied post
  • Section-wise marks (General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge & General Awareness, Elementary Mathematics, English/Hindi)
  • Raw and normalized marks
  • Total marks in CBT (considered for final merit after qualifying PET/PST and medical)
  • Qualifying status (selected/not selected) and any remarks
  • Note on limited availability window

SSC GD Final Cut Off and Merit List 2025

The SSC GD final cut off 2025 was released with the final result on January 15, 2026, and is force-wise, state-wise, category-wise, and gender-wise. It appears in the official result PDF write-up.

Your scorecard marks should be compared to the relevant cut-off for your category/force/state to assess selection. The merit list PDF lists roll numbers of provisionally selected candidates (around 50,047 selected against vacancies), while the scorecard provides individual marks for those who reached physical/medical stages.

(Refer to the official SSC result PDFs for exact cut-off tables - examples range from ~104 to 152+ depending on category/force.)

What to Do After Downloading SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Selected candidates: Keep multiple printouts/PDFs of the scorecard and final result for document verification, joining, and force allocation.

Verify details (name, roll number, category, etc.) - report serious discrepancies to SSC regional offices promptly.

Non-selected candidates: Use marks for performance analysis and preparation for future SSC exams.

Download and save copies early - the window closes after the last date.

SSC GD Selection Process 2025 (Short Overview)

The process included:

  • Computer-Based Test (CBT): Four sections totaling 160 marks.
  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Physical Standard Test (PST): Qualifying.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME)/Review Medical Examination (RME): Qualifying.
  • Final merit based on normalized CBT marks (for qualified candidates), followed by force/state allocation per vacancies and preferences.

The final scorecard reflects CBT performance post-qualifying stages, available briefly post-result.

Important Links for SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  • SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Download: ssc.gov.in (login to Result/Marks)
  • SSC GD Final Result 2025 Merit List PDF: Available on ssc.gov.in under Results
  • SSC GD Final Cut Off 2025 PDF: In final result write-up on ssc.gov.in
  • SSC Official Website: ssc.gov.in

Course on Computer Concepts (CCC) Exam May 2026

NIELIT CCC Exam May 2026 : Short Details of Notification

WWW.OnlyJobs

Important Dates

  • CCC Exam Date: May 2026
  • Admit Card Available : Before Exam

Application Fee

  • General / Other State : 0/-
  • OBC / BC : 0/-
  • SC / ST : 0/-
  • No Application Fee to Download the CCC Exam Admit Card.  

NIELIT CCC Exam 2026 : Conducted By

  • The CCC exam is organized by the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT), Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India.

How to Download NIELIT CCC Admit Card 2026

  • You can easily download the admit card of NIELIT CCC exam from your mobile and desktop. You just have to follow some steps.
  • Step 1 :  First of all, you will see the link of download admit card in the Some Useful Important Link section at the bottom of this page, you have to click on it.
  • Step 2 : A new page student.nielit.gov.in will open.
  • Step 3 : In the new page that has been opened, on the right side you will get the link of download admit card, you have to click on it.
  • Step 4 : Now you see the name of all the courses organized by NIELIT, in that you have to select Course on Computer Concepts (CCC) in IT Literacy Program section.
  • Step 5 : Now you will see an undertaking, you have to read it and then
  • Step 6 : Now you have to select the exam year, after that you have to select the month of the exam. In the last, you have to enter your application number along with your date of birth, after filling the Captcha code given on the wow, you will see the button of View and then you will get the button of print admit card, you have to click on it.
  • Step 7  : The admit card of NIELIT CCC exam will now be shown on your screen, now you can print it in color or black and white. Also, if you do not have a printer available, you can save it and take a print out before the exam.
  • Step 8 : Before going to NIELIT CCC exam, read carefully all the instructions given in the admit card such as exam date, reporting time, gate closing time, original valid photo identity card related information and other NIELIT CCC exam instructions you will get in the admit card. will.

Enrolled Candidate Can Download the NIELIT CCC Exam 2025 Admit Card.

  • There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC Lekhpal Recruitment Advt No. 02-Exam/2025 Recruitment 2025.
  • First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category.

How to Download Indian Army Agniveer Admit Card 2026?

  • Step 1 : Open the Website ssc.gov.in or Direct Link Will be in this Page Some Useful Important Links Section
  • Step 2 : Click on New Registration Tab
  • Step 3 : Students will have to give their basic information such as: Name, Father's Name, Mother's Name, Mobile Number, Email Id and High School Class 10 Roll Number.
  • Step 4 : Verify Your OTR Profile Details & Submit Registration.
  • Step 5 : An OTP will be received on the registered email and registered mobile number of the candidate, he will have to enter it.
  • Step 6 : The registration Part I process will be completed, the candidate will see the OTR Registration No. on the screen.
  • Step 7 : In the next step, you will have to change the default password which has been received on your email, after that you will have to login by writing the registration number along with the password which has been received on the email.
  • Step 9 : Candidates should change the default password of OTR registration number with their custom password. Use capital letters, small letters, numbers and special characters while creating the new password which should be at least 08 digits. Additionally, two security questions will also have to be selected, so that if you forget your password in future, you can recover your password with the help of the security question.
  • Step 10 :  After changing the password, the candidate will have to login again, after that the information about his nationality, category, Visible Identification Mark and information about permanent and local address will be entered in the form.
  • Step 11 : The last step is that here you have to first double check all the information by clicking on the preview button of OTR, after checking, if there is any error then correct it, otherwise click on the declare button and submit the form finally.
  • Step 12 : The registration process of SSC OTR has now been completed, the candidate will be able to see the dashboard whenever any new recruitment comes, or the candidate can also get the information about admit card and result by logging into the SSC dashboard.
  • Our team has also shown a video on how to do SSC one time registration, which you can watch and do your new registration by following the step by step process: SSC OTR Registration Kaise Kare Video Dekhe
  • For more information, you have to complete the notice issued to SSC OTR.

Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Indian Army HQ 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji, Goa has released the official Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C' Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026 at the official website indianarmy.nic.in. A total of 190 vacancies have been announced under the CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 and 25 years with a qualification of Matriculation (10th) and minimum 6 months experience in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board can apply via email from 02 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. The official notification PDF and email application instructions are available below.

FOLLOW US

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

The Headquarters 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji, Goa (Indian Army / Ministry of Defence, Government of India) has officially released the Employment Notice for recruitment to 190 posts of Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C' on probation for a period of two years followed by permanent absorption subject to satisfactory performance. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, age criteria, selection process, examination scheme, reservation norms, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying. The notification PDF is available on the official Indian Army recruitment page.

  • Download Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name HQ 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji, Goa - Indian Army, Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India
Employment Notice No. Advt_020526 dated 02/05/2026
Post Name Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C'
Department Ministry of Defence, Government of India
Service Liability All India Service Liability including Field Service
Total Vacancies 190 (including 12 PwBD posts and 20 ESM posts - Horizontal Reservation)
Pay Scale Rs. 21,700/- + allowances (Level-3, Cell-1 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix)
Application Mode Online only - via official email ID: [email protected] (PDF application form submitted as email attachment)
Selection Mode Written Test (100 marks) + Practical Test (Qualifying) + Interview (Qualifying) + Medical Test
Mandatory Requirement Minimum 6 months experience in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board - Experience Certificate mandatory
Official Email [email protected]

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date & Time
Opening Date and Time of Online Application 02-05-2026 (0001 Hrs)
Last Date and Time for Receipt of Online Application 31-05-2026 (2359 Hrs)
Written Test / Practical Test / Interview Date To be intimated to eligible candidates through call letters via registered email ID only
Age Calculated As On 31-05-2026 (Last date of receipt of application)

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 190 vacancies have been announced for the post of Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C'. These are distributed across UR, SC, ST, OBC, and EWS categories as vertical reservation. Additionally, 12 posts are horizontally reserved for PwBD candidates and 20 posts are horizontally reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) as per DoPT OM No. 36035/02/2017/Estt (Res) dated 15 Jan 2018.

Post Name Total Posts PwBD (Horizontal) ESM (Horizontal)
CSBO Grade-II 190 12 20

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application (31-05-2026). Only citizens of India are eligible to apply. Proficiency in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board with a minimum experience of 6 months is a crucial and mandatory criterion - no application will be accepted without a valid Experience Certificate in handling PBX Board. The post is subject to All India Service Liability including Field Service.

Educational Qualification

Qualification Type Details
Essential Qualification (i) Matric or equivalent from a recognized Board
Essential Qualification (ii) Proficiency in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board with minimum 6 months experience (Experience Certificate mandatory)
Desirable Fluency in spoken English and Hindi

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be between 18 and 25 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application (31-05-2026). Age relaxations are available for reserved categories and special groups as specified below. The crucial date for determining the age limit shall be the last date of receipt of application. No extra weightage will be given for additional/extra/higher qualifications for recruitment.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) / EWS 18 to 25 years (as on 31-05-2026)
OBC 3 years relaxation (max 28 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (max 30 years)
PwBD (UR/EWS) 10 years relaxation (max 35 years)
PwBD (OBC) 13 years relaxation (10 + 3 years)
PwBD (SC/ST) 15 years relaxation (10 + 5 years)
Ex-Servicemen Additional 3 years relaxation (over and above actual military service rendered)
Departmental Candidates (with 3 years continuous service) Up to 40 years (45 years for SC/ST candidates)

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

The official notification does not specify any application fee for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026. No fee details have been mentioned in the Employment Notice. Candidates are advised to check the official notification carefully and contact the official email ID [email protected] for any fee-related clarifications. No TA/DA is admissible for appearing in Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview - candidates must make their own arrangements for boarding/lodging at 2 STC, Goa.

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 consists of 3 stages - Written Test (100 marks, merit-based), Practical Test (qualifying only), and Interview (qualifying only), followed by a Medical Test for shortlisted candidates. Selection will be made strictly on the basis of merit in the Written Test, subject to the candidate qualifying in the Practical Test and Interview. To reduce the number of candidates for the Written Examination, screening of applications may be carried out based on percentage of marks obtained in Matriculation/10th Board examination.

Stage 1 - Written Test (100 Marks - Merit Based)

Part Subject Type Marks
Part-I General Intelligence & Numerical Aptitude Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Part-II General Awareness Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Part-III General English Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Part-IV Logic & Reasoning Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Total 100

The question paper will be bilingual (English and Hindi). However, questions of General English subject will be in English only. No extra weightage will be given for additional/extra/higher qualifications.

Stage 2 - Practical Test and Interview (Qualifying Only)

Practical Test To check candidate's proficiency in handling exchange operation - Qualifying in nature only (marks not counted for merit)
Interview Conducted along with Practical Test for qualifying purpose only - marks not counted for final merit

Stage 3 - Medical Test

Medical Test Only shortlisted candidates based on performance in Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview will be directed to undergo Medical Test as per extant Government Orders

Terms of Engagement

Probation Period 2 years probation followed by permanent absorption subject to satisfactory performance
Pension New entrants joining on or after 01 Jan 2004 are governed by the National Pension System
Retention Beyond 55 Years / 30 Years of Service Subject to screening committee approval; retirement from service on attaining age of 60 years if retained
Disqualification Candidate will be disqualified if found to have contracted a marriage while having a living spouse, or entered into another marriage

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Exam Syllabus

The Written Test consists of 4 parts - General Intelligence & Numerical Aptitude, General Awareness, General English, and Logic & Reasoning - each carrying 25 marks (total 100 marks), all Objective Multiple Choice Type. The question paper is bilingual (English and Hindi) except the General English section which is in English only. After the Written Test, shortlisted candidates undergo a Practical Test and Interview (both qualifying in nature) to assess proficiency in handling exchange/PBX Board operations.

Part Topic Marks
Part-I General Intelligence & Numerical Aptitude 25
Part-II General Awareness 25
Part-III General English 25
Part-IV Logic & Reasoning 25

How to Apply for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the official email ID [email protected]. Hard copy applications sent by post will not be accepted. The application window is open from 02-05-2026 (0001 Hrs) to 31-05-2026 (2359 Hrs). Candidates must open the PDF application form in Adobe Acrobat Reader ONLY - do NOT open in browser (Chrome/Edge) as fields may not work. All fields marked with * are mandatory and must not be left blank. All text must be typed in BLOCK LETTERS (CAPITALS).

Candidates should not send their application more than once. Incomplete or wrongly named applications will be rejected without notice. Applications with missing attachments, unsigned forms, or mismatched information will be summarily rejected. Candidates must carry originals of all documents for verification while appearing for examination along with two additional self-attested photographs. For difficulties in filling the application form, candidates may send a screenshot of the issue to [email protected].

Documents to be Submitted Along with Application (as self-attested attachments to email):

  • Birth Certificate (Matriculation Certificate/Mark Sheet can be produced in lieu)
  • Educational Certificate - Matriculation Passing Certificate and Mark Sheet
  • Experience Certificate in handling PBX/EPABX Board (minimum 6 months duration - mandatory)
  • Residential Certificate
  • Domicile Certificate
  • Aadhaar Card (mandatory); PAN Card (optional)
  • Caste/Category Certificate in prescribed format (for all reserved categories - SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD)
  • Discharge Certificate (mandatory for Ex-Servicemen candidates, in addition to category certificate)
  • No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (if already a Government servant)
  • Passport size photograph (JPG file - latest, not older than 3 months; saved as PHOTO_YourFullName.jpg)
  • Signed application form saved as CSBO_YourFullName.pdf

Applications must be emailed to: [email protected] with the subject line: CSBO Application – YOUR FULL NAME

Applications must be addressed to: The Commandant, Headquarters, 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji (Goa) – 403001

Official Email for Application: [email protected]

Last Date for Email Submission: 31 May 2026 (2359 Hrs)

Important Instructions for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only citizens of India are eligible to apply; the post is subject to All India Service Liability including Field Service.
  • PBX Board handling experience of minimum 6 months is mandatory - no application will be accepted without the Experience Certificate.
  • No hard copy applications will be accepted - submission via official email only ([email protected]).
  • No application fee is required; no TA/DA is admissible for Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview.
  • Do not send your application more than once - incomplete or wrongly named applications will be rejected without notice.
  • Shortlisted candidates will be intimated via call letters sent to their registered email ID only - department not responsible for non-receipt of call letters.
  • Screening of applications may be done based on Matriculation/10th Board marks percentage to reduce the number of candidates for Written Examination.
  • Merely fulfilling the basic selection criteria does not automatically entitle a person to be called for test/interview.
  • Persons working in Central/State Govt/PSU must apply through proper channel with NOC from their establishment.
  • Ex-Servicemen candidates must enclose self-attested photocopy of complete discharge book along with the undertaking format provided with the application.
  • EWS candidates must provide income/asset certificate from the competent authority.
  • Candidates must carry originals of all documents for verification while appearing for examination along with two additional self-attested photographs.
  • Falsification of documents at any stage will lead to cancellation of candidature.
  • Attempts to influence the selection process or use of unfair means (forgery, impersonation, false information) may lead to termination of candidature or legal action.
  • The Appointing Authority has the right to cancel/postpone/suspend/terminate/modify the notification without prior notice at any stage.
  • Recruitment Board's decision will be final in all matters.

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Mining Recruitment 2026: Get the latest CIL recruitment notification 2026 for 276 Management Trainee (Mining) vacancies through GATE 2025 under Coal India Limited (CIL), a Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Coal, Government of India. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 7th June 2026. Find CIL Management Trainee vacancies across India on the official website http://coalindia.in. You can also get OnlyJobs of “Upcoming CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026” notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 apply online from the Coal India career page.

FOLLOW US

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Coal India Limited (CIL) has officially released Advertisement No. 01/2026 dated 05/05/2026 for recruitment of Management Trainees in E-1 Grade in the Mining discipline based on GATE-2025 Scores. CIL is a Schedule 'A', Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Coal, Government of India, with Corporate Headquarters at Kolkata - the single largest coal producing company in the world. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, selection process, application fee, reservation norms, pay, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification and FAQs before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the official CIL website.

  • Download CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF
  • Download CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 FAQ PDF

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name Coal India Limited (CIL), Kolkata (A Maharatna Company - Govt. of India Undertaking)
Advertisement No. 01/2026 dated 05/05/2026
Post Name Management Trainee (Mining) - E-1 Grade
Department Ministry of Coal, Government of India
Post Code 10 (Mining) | GATE Paper Code: MN
Total Vacancies 276 (Tentative)

Selection Mode GATE-2025 Score based shortlisting + Documents Verification (DV) + Initial Medical Examination (IME)
Mandatory Requirement Valid GATE-2025 Score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) - GATE scores of other years not valid

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Advertisement 05/05/2026
Opening of Online Application Portal 08-05-2026 (10:00 AM)
Last Date for Online Application Submission 07-06-2026 (upto 6:00 PM)
Correction Window (for Online Application) Not applicable - no modifications allowed after submission
Age Calculated As On 30-04-2026
Documents Verification (DV) & Initial Medical Examination (IME) To be notified on CIL website (www.coalindia.in)

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 276 vacancies (tentative) have been announced for the post of Management Trainee (Mining) in E-1 Grade. These are distributed across General (UR), EWS, SC, ST, and OBC (NCL) categories. The vacancy figures may increase or decrease as per actual requirements. EWS vacancies not filled in this recruitment year will not be carried forward as backlog to the next year.

Discipline Post Code Total Vacancies
Mining 10 276*

*Tentative - may increase or decrease as per requirement.

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (07-06-2026). Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. A valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) is mandatory - GATE scores of any other year (prior to or after 2025) will not be considered valid for this recruitment. The qualifying degree must be from a University/Institute recognized by the appropriate statutory authority in India and must be a regular full-time course.

Candidates having completed their degree or passed their final semester examination as on the cut-off date are eligible. In case of any dispute regarding admissibility of any particular qualification, the decision of the Chairman, Coal India Limited shall be final and binding.

Educational Qualification

Post Code Discipline Minimum Qualification
10 Mining Degree in Mining Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (55% for SC/ST candidates) from a University/Institute recognized by appropriate statutory authority in India - regular full-time course only
Mandatory GATE Requirement Valid GATE-2025 Score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) - GATE-2025 only; scores of other years not valid
CGPA/GPA Conversion Conversion in percentage certificate issued by the University/Institute must be attached without fail if degree is in CGPA/GPA/CPI format

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

The upper age limit is 30 years as on 30th April 2026 for General (UR) and EWS category candidates. Category-wise relaxations are available as specified below. The maximum age of any applicant on the crucial date (30th April 2026) shall not exceed 56 years under any circumstance. Departmental candidates of Coal India Limited or its Subsidiary companies are not subject to any age limit.

Category Upper Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) / EWS 30 years (as on 30-04-2026)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (max 33 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (max 35 years)
J&K Domicile Candidates (domicile during 01.01.1980 to 31.12.1989) 5 years relaxation (as per Govt. of India guidelines)
Ex-Servicemen (ESM) As per extant Govt. of India guidelines (maximum age not to exceed 56 years)
Departmental Candidates of CIL / Subsidiary Companies No upper age limit applicable

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Candidates applying for the post of Management Trainee (Mining) are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online only. CIL will not be responsible if a candidate deposits the fee in any wrong account. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are advised to verify their eligibility before applying.

Category Application Fee
General (UR) / OBC (Creamy Layer & Non-Creamy Layer) / EWS Rs. 1,000/- + GST Rs. 180/- = Rs. 1,180/- (Rupees One Thousand One Hundred and Eighty only)
SC / ST / Employees of Coal India Limited and its Subsidiaries Exempted (No Application Fee)

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for CIL Management Trainee (Mining) Recruitment 2026 is based entirely on the valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN). There is no separate written examination. Eligible candidates will be shortlisted category-wise in the ratio of 1:3 (3 candidates per vacancy) in order of merit based on GATE-2025 Scores/Marks. The final merit list will be prepared on the basis of GATE-2025 Scores/Marks only. An Offer of Appointment will be issued only after successful completion of Documents Verification (DV) and Initial Medical Examination (IME).

Selection Based on GATE-2025 Score

Stage Details
Shortlisting Based on GATE-2025 Score/Marks in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN); shortlisted category-wise in ratio of 1:3 (3 candidates per vacancy) in order of merit
Documents Verification (DV) Shortlisted candidates will be called for Documents Verification; intimated via CIL website and registered email ID only
Initial Medical Examination (IME) By the company's Medical Committee as per CIL Medical Attendance Rules; Medical Committee decision is final and binding
Offer of Appointment Issued only after successful completion of DV & IME

Tie-Breaking Rules

1st Tie-Break Candidate scoring higher percentage marks / CGPA in the minimum eligible qualification (Mining Engineering degree) will be placed higher in the merit list
2nd Tie-Break Seniority of age (older candidate preferred) if tie persists after 1st tie-break

Post-Selection Details

Training Period 1-year training-cum-probation period; on successful completion, service confirmed in E-1 Grade as Officer (Mining)
Posting Anywhere in India including Subsidiary companies and Coalfield areas; candidates must submit 3 posting preferences but final posting is as per CIL Management decision
Service Agreement Bond Minimum service of 60 months from date of joining; Bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs + applicable GST; Rs. 5,000/- per month deducted from salary towards bond money, refunded without interest after 60 months

How to Apply for CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the CIL official website www.coalindia.in under the section "Career with CIL >>> Jobs at Coal India." Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 08-05-2026 (10:00 AM) to 07-06-2026 (6:00 PM). Candidates are advised not to wait until the last date and to register and submit their application well within time. No modifications are allowed after the online application form is submitted. If more than one application is received from a candidate, the most recent/current application will be considered as final.

All documents must be uploaded as self-attested scanned copies - scanned documents that are not clear and legible may result in rejection of candidature. Candidates must have an active email ID and mobile number valid for at least one year - no change in email ID or mobile number will be allowed after submission. For queries, candidates may refer to the FAQs on CIL's website or write to [email protected].

Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:

  • Recent passport size colour photograph (not older than 3 weeks, JPG/JPEG format)
  • Signature with black ink pen (JPG/JPEG format)
  • Matriculation/Secondary Board Certificate/Admit Card/Birth Certificate (age proof)
  • Mark sheet of graduation (percentage proof); CGPA/GPA/CPI conversion certificate issued by University/Institute (if applicable)
  • Final/Provisional Degree/Graduation Certificate
  • OBC (NCL) / SC / ST Caste Certificate in prescribed format issued on or after 01.04.2026 (if applicable)
  • Income & Asset Certificate (EWS) issued by competent authority based on income for 2025-26, valid for 2026-27 (if applicable)
  • Discharge/Service Certificate (Ex-Servicemen candidates)
  • J&K Domicile Certificate in prescribed format issued by competent authority (if applicable)

Government/PSU/Autonomous body employees must submit NOC from their current employer at the time of DV & IME, or a proper relieving order at the time of joining.

Apply Online at: https://www.coalindia.in (Career with CIL > Jobs at Coal India)

Important Instructions for CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only Indian Nationals with a valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) are eligible to apply.
  • Qualifying degree must be regular full-time from a University/Institute recognized by appropriate statutory authority in India.
  • No hard copy applications will be accepted - online submission only via CIL website.
  • Application fee is non-refundable; applications submitted by unqualified candidates will be rejected.
  • No modifications are allowed after online application is submitted - discrepancies between online data and original documents may lead to rejection.
  • GATE scores of any year other than GATE-2025 are not valid and will not be considered.
  • OBC (Creamy Layer) candidates must apply under General (UR) category and are not entitled to OBC (NCL) concession/reservation.
  • OBC (NCL) caste certificate must be issued on or after 01.04.2026 in the latest prescribed format for Central Government/PSU appointment purpose.
  • Government/PSU employees must submit NOC/relieving letter from current employer at DV & IME stage or at the time of joining - no pay protection or bond transfer benefits on joining.
  • Selected candidates must execute a service agreement bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs + GST and serve for a minimum of 60 months from date of joining.
  • Candidates must keep their registered email ID and mobile number active for at least one year - no changes will be allowed.
  • Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.
  • Any modifications/amendments/corrigendum in the advertisement will be published only on CIL's website www.coalindia.in.
  • All disputes related to this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Kolkata only.
  • CIL reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify/alter the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason.
  • The decision of the Chairman, CIL on all matters relating to eligibility, acceptance/rejection of applications, selection, and posting is final and binding.

South East Central Railway (SECR) Recruitment 2026-27 has been announced for Trade Apprentice (Act Apprenticeship) posts! Published on 05 May 2026 at the official website secr.indianrailways.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 1644 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 15 to 24 years age group and possessing a 10th Pass with minimum 50% marks along with ITI in relevant trade can apply online from 05 May 2026 to 04 June 2026. SECR Raipur Division Act Apprentice Vacancy 2026-27

A total of 1644 vacancies have been notified across two establishments for multiple designated ITI trades. The vacancies are distributed across reservation categories - UR (Unreserved), EWS (Economically Weaker Section), OBC (Other Backward Classes), SC (Scheduled Caste), and ST (Scheduled Tribe).

Horizontal reservations are also provided for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) and Ex-Servicemen (Ex.SM). The Fitter and Electrician trades have the highest number of vacancies in the Raipur Division, while Fitter and Welder dominate the Wagon Repair Shop vacancies. Candidates may note that if EWS category seats remain unfilled, they will be filled as per SECR/HQ clarification No. P-HQ/RUL/101/10 (E-50910) dated 13.02.2024.

1. DRM Office, Raipur Division (Total: 1363 Vacancies):

SECR Raipur Division Act Apprentice Eligibility Criteria 2026-27

Candidates must fulfil both the educational/technical qualification requirements and the age limit to be eligible for this recruitment. The educational qualifications are mandatory and must have already been obtained before the date of notification - candidates appearing in qualifying examinations or awaiting results are not eligible.

The minimum 10th class marks of 50% aggregate is mandatory and the fraction will be applied strictly (e.g., 49.9% will be treated as less than 50%).

ITI qualification must be in the relevant trade from a recognised institution. Candidates are not required to wait for their ITI marksheet if already passed - they must have the actual pass certificate in hand at the time of application. Council Registration (NCVT/SCVT) of the ITI is also required to be verified during document verification.

Educational Qualification:

Criteria Requirement
10th Standard Passed under 10+2 system or equivalent with minimum 50% aggregate marks
ITI Passed ITI in the relevant trade from a recognised institution
Result Status Must have already passed both qualifications on the date of notification (05.05.2026)

Age Limit (as on 05.05.2026):

Sr. No. Community Date of Birth Range (Both Dates Inclusive)
01 UR 05-05-2002 to 05-05-2011
02 SC 05-05-1997 to 05-05-2011
03 ST 05-05-1997 to 05-05-2011
04 OBC 05-05-1999 to 05-05-2011
05 PwBD / Ex-Servicemen 05-05-1992 to 05-05-2011

Age Relaxation:

Category Relaxation
SC / ST 5 years
OBC 3 years
Ex-Servicemen 10 years
PwBD 10 years

SECR Raipur Division Act Apprentice Application Fee 2026-27

The official notification does not specify any application fee for this Act Apprentice recruitment. This is consistent with the standard practice for apprenticeship recruitment under the Apprentices Act-1961 conducted by Indian Railway divisions through the National Apprenticeship Training portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in).

No Travelling Allowance (TA) or Daily Allowance (DA) will be paid to candidates for any stage of this recruitment process, including document verification.

Category Application Fee
All Categories NIL (No fee mentioned)

SECR Raipur Division Act Apprentice Selection Process 2026-27

The selection of candidates for Act Apprenticeship in SECR Raipur Division and Wagon Repair Shop, Raipur is based purely on merit, with no written examination. The merit list is prepared by taking the average of the percentage marks obtained in both the 10th (Matriculation) examination and the ITI examination, giving equal weightage to both (as per Railway Establishment Rule 201/2017).

The minimum eligibility score for 10th is 50% aggregate. Candidates who qualify in the merit list will be called for document verification, where all original certificates must be produced. If any discrepancy is found between the uploaded documents and originals, or if original documents are not produced, the candidature will be cancelled.

The Railway Administration's decision in all matters relating to eligibility, acceptance or rejection of applications, and mode of selection is final and binding.

Merit List Preparation Formula:

Component Weightage
10th (Matriculation) Marks Percentage 50%
ITI Marks Percentage 50%
Basis Average of both (equal weightage)

Post-Selection Requirements:

Requirement Details
Medical Examination Medical certificate required at document verification stage as per Apprenticeship Act 1961 and Apprenticeship Rule 1992; must be signed by Government Authorized Doctor (GAZ) not below rank of Asstt. Surgeon
Contract Selected candidate (or guardian if minor) must enter into a contract of apprenticeship with the employer
Training Period 1 year for each trade, with stipend as per Railway Board rules

How to Apply for SECR Raipur Division Act Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27

The application process is entirely online through the National Apprenticeship India portal. No physical copy of the application is to be sent to the DRM Office, Raipur Division, or Wagon Repair Shop, Raipur. Candidates must register on the portal, fill in all required details accurately, and upload soft/scanned copies of their recent passport-size colour photograph, signature, and all necessary documents pertaining to educational and technical qualification.

SC/ST/OBC candidates must also upload their recent caste certificate issued by the competent authority in the prescribed format and verify their Aadhaar on the portal. OBC candidates must additionally upload a Non-Creamy Layer Certificate - the OBC certificate must not be older than one year from the closing date of this notification.

PwBD candidates must upload a disability certificate from a Medical Board constituted by the Central or State Government certifying not less than 40% disability. EWS candidates must produce their EWS certificate as per sample Annexure-E at the time of document verification.

  • Apply Online at: https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
  • Application Window: 05/05/2026 to 04/06/2026 (till 23:59 hrs)
  • Upload: Passport-size colour photograph, scanned signature, 10th marksheet, ITI certificate, Caste/EWS/PwBD certificate (as applicable), Aadhaar verification
  • SC/ST/OBC candidates must upload recent caste certificate on the portal and verify Aadhaar
  • No physical application to be sent to the office

Important Instructions for Candidates

Candidates must read all instructions carefully before applying. Applications must be submitted only through the official portal - no other mode of application will be accepted. Canvassing in any form will immediately disqualify the candidate.

No Travelling Allowance or Daily Allowance will be paid to candidates for any stage of the recruitment. If at any stage it is found that a candidate has furnished wrong, fake, or false certificates, the Railway Administration reserves the right to discharge the candidate without notice - even after selection for training.

  • Apply online only at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
  • No physical copy of the application to be sent to the DRM Office or Wagon Repair Shop.
  • Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
  • Candidates must already hold the required qualifications on the date of notification (05.05.2026) - candidates awaiting results are not eligible.
  • All original documents must be produced at the time of document verification.
  • No TA/DA will be paid for any stage of the recruitment.
  • The Railway Administration's decision in all matters is final and binding.

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Patna has invited online applications for engagement of PGTs, TGTs, Creative Teachers and Staff Nurse on a purely contractual basis in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas (JNVs) under Patna Region for the academic session 2026-27. The recruitment is for JNVs located in the states of Bihar, Jharkhand and West Bengal. Eligible and interested candidates can submit their applications online from 08 May 2026 to 15 May 2026. Selected candidates will be engaged on contract basis and posted in any JNV under Patna Region. It is mandatory for selected teachers to reside in the Vidyalaya campus. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

FOLLOW US

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 Notification

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti, Regional Office Patna has released the official notification for empanelment and engagement of Post Graduate Teachers (PGTs), Trained Graduate Teachers (TGTs), Creative Teachers and Staff Nurse on contractual basis for the session 2026-27. The detailed notification, educational qualifications, remuneration, age criteria and selection process are available on the official website of NVS RO Patna. Candidates are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying.

States Covered Bihar, Jharkhand & West Bengal

Application Mode Online only
Online Application Period 08 May 2026 to 15 May 2026

NVS Patna Region - Vacancy Details

Vacancies are available for the following posts (exact number will depend on requirement in JNVs of Bihar, Jharkhand & West Bengal):

  • PGTs: Hindi, English, Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Biology, History, Geography, Economics, Commerce, Computer Science, Bengali, Physical Education etc.
  • TGTs: Hindi, English, Maths, Science, Social Science, Computer Science, Art, Music, Librarian, Physical Education (Male/Female), 3rd Language (Bengali/Urdu) etc.
  • Others: Special Educator, Vocational Teacher (Hospitality & Tourism), Staff Nurse.

Post Normal Station (per month) Hard Station (per month)

TGTs & Librarian Rs. 34,125/- Rs. 40,625/-
Staff Nurse Rs. 34,125/- Rs. 40,625/-

  • Female Staff Nurse: Not exceeding 35 years as on 01 June 2026.

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

For PGTs:

  • Master’s Degree in concerned subject with at least 50% marks + B.Ed. from NCTE recognized institution.
  • Proficiency in teaching in English & Hindi medium.

For TGTs:

  • Bachelor’s Degree with concerned subject + B.Ed. with minimum 50% marks.
  • Qualified in CTET (Paper-II).

For Staff Nurse:

  • B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing + Registration with State Nursing Council + 2½ years experience in minimum 50-bedded hospital.

Desirable Qualifications (common for most posts):

  • Experience in residential / Navodaya schools.
  • Knowledge of Computer Applications.
  • Proficiency in regional languages.

How to Apply for NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026

  1. Visit Official Portal Go to www.trschooms.in (link will be activated on NVS RO Patna website).
  2. Register & Fill Application Register with valid email ID and mobile number. Fill personal, educational and experience details carefully.
  3. Upload Documents Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, educational certificates, experience certificates, CTET certificate, caste certificate (if applicable) etc.
  4. Submit Application Review the form and submit online before 15 May 2026. Take printout of the submitted application.
  5. Prepare for Personal Interaction Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for document verification and personal interaction scheduled between 21 to 23 May 2026 at designated JNVs (Rajgir, Ranchi & Paschim Burdwan).
  6. Attend Personal Interaction Report at the allotted venue with all original documents and self-attested photocopies on the scheduled date.

Important Instructions for Candidates

  • Selected candidates must reside in the JNV campus.

  • Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

Call letters for online examination will be communicated via email from [email protected]. No hard copy of the call letter will be sent by post. For queries: [email protected] or [email protected].

Apply Online at: https://beep.bfsissc.com/candidate_register/mkt

Important Instructions for Union Bank of India Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Candidates

Tentative Date of Computer Based Test (CBT) Will be notified on website
Tentative Date of Declaration of Results Will be notified on website

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Post Name Minimum Qualification
Asst. Foreman (Electrical) (Trainee) Diploma in Electrical Engineering (3 years) approved by AICTE OR Degree in Electrical & Electronics Engineering approved by AICTE
Technician (Electrician) (Trainee) Matriculate + ITI (2 years) in Electrician Trade with NCVT/SCVT certificate + 1 year training/experience + LT Permit under IE rules for Mines or 440-550 Volts mining parts permit

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Age Limit

The upper age limit is 30 years as on 28.05.2026 for General (UR) and EWS category candidates. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

Category Upper Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) / EWS 30 years
OBC (NCL) 3 years
SC / ST 5 years
Ex-Servicemen (ESM) Service period + 3 years
PwBD (only for Asst. Foreman) 10/13/15 years (as applicable)
Departmental Candidates (CIL & Subsidiaries) No upper age limit

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

Category Fee
General (UR) / OBC (Creamy Layer & Non-Creamy Layer) / EWS ₹1,000/- + GST ₹180/- = ₹1,180/- (Non-Refundable)
SC / ST / PwBD / ESM / Female candidates / Employees of Coal India Limited and its Subsidiaries Nil (Exempted)

Fee can be paid online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking only. No other mode of payment will be accepted. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Exam Pattern

The selection methodology will comprise of Computer Based Test (CBT) only. No personal interview will be held. The CBT will consist of objective type questions with multiple choice answers. There will be no negative marking for wrong answers. Instructions will be bilingual (English/Hindi).

The CBT will consist of two sections totalling 100 marks: Section "A" comprising 20 questions on General Awareness/Aptitude (1 mark each), and Section "B" comprising 80 questions on Technical Knowledge (1 mark each). Total time: 2 hours.

Section Subject No. of Questions Marks
Section A General Awareness / Aptitude 20 20
Section B Technical Knowledge 80 80
Total   100 100

Qualifying Marks in CBT:

Category Qualifying Marks
General/EWS Candidates 45 marks (45% of 100)
OBC (NCL) Candidates 40 marks (40% of 100)
SC/ST Candidates 35 marks (35% of 100)

Candidates may opt for three Test Cities from the list as per their preference at the time of applying. The same cannot be changed after the online form is submitted. MCL reserves the right to allocate or change the Test City.

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

The selection for MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 will be based on the following stages:

Computer Based Test (CBT): Eligible candidates will be provisionally called for CBT on the basis of their self-declaration regarding eligibility. Scrutiny/verification of eligibility claims will be done post-declaration of CBT results for candidates called for document verification.

Document Verification: Based on the merit order of marks secured in CBT, shortlisted qualified candidates in the ratio of 1:3 will be called for document verification. In case of a tie in marks, it will be resolved on the basis of Date of Birth (elder candidate first) and thereafter Name alphabets. Candidates must appear with all original certificates/documents and photocopies as per eligibility criteria. Candidates working in Govt./Semi Govt./Autonomous Bodies/PSUs/CIL & Subsidiaries must produce a "No Objection Certificate" from their employer.

Provisional Select List: After verification of documents/certificates, a Provisional Select List of successful candidates will be published on the official website of MCL (https://mahanadicoal.in).

Final Appointment: Provisionally selected candidates will be issued an offer of appointment based on their position in the merit list and with due consideration of reservation policy of Govt. of India for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PwBD/EWS/ESM. The validity of the merit panel will be for 01 year or as per extant Govt. guidelines.

Medical Fitness: Selected candidates will have to undergo Initial Medical Examination (IME) in the designated Hospital by the Company's Doctor. Final appointment/joining will be subject to being declared medically fit as per rule. Minimum required height of the candidate should be 60 inches (excluding for the post of Asst. Foreman (Electrical) (Trainee), T&S Gr-C only in case of Dwarfism).

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Career Growth

  • For the post of Asst. Foreman (Electrical) (E&M), further career growth of candidates to T&S Gr-B and onwards will be subject to acquisition of Electrical Supervisorship Certificate of Competency valid for Mines as per the Cadre Scheme.
  • For the post of Technician (Electrician) (E&M), trainees in Cat-III will be regularized as Electrician, Cat-IV after successful completion of one year training in E&M cadre and possession of valid minimum requisite Electrician Statutory permit/certificate.

How to Apply for MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates must submit their application online through the official website mahanadicoal.in under CAREERS >>>> Recruitment section. No other means/mode of application will be accepted.

Step 1 - Read Instructions: Read Important Instructions carefully and click on (√) "I Agree" button.

Step 2 - Register: Register by filling necessary details (Post opted, name, Mobile No. and email ID) and click on Submit Button. Note the Application Sequence No., User ID and Password received on your email and mobile number.

Step 3 - Login & Fill Application: Re-login using User ID and Password. Click on the Application Form option, fill all necessary details in the respective fields and upload required documents, Photo and Signature.

Step 4 - Preview & Submit: Check Preview of the Application Form and make corrections if any. Press the Submit Button.

Step 5 - Pay Fee & Print: Make online payment through Debit Card/Credit Card/Net Banking (as applicable). Take a printout of the application form for future record.

Note: The last date for submission of application is 28/May/2026 up to 11:50 PM. Candidates are advised not to wait till the last date and time for applying online. MCL shall not be responsible if candidates are unable to submit applications at the last hour due to network congestion.

MCL Assistant Foreman, Technician Recruitment 2026 Documents Required

Keep the following scanned documents ready (valid as on cut-off date) before filling the online application:

  • E-Mail ID and Mobile Number
  • Personal and Educational Qualification Details
  • Scanned Copy of Matriculation (X) Certificate/Mark sheets/ITI/Diploma/Degree Certificate/Mark sheets (Jpg/Jpeg/PDF format)
  • Scanned Copy of Valid Caste Certificate (OBC (NCL)/SC/ST) and Income Certificates for EWS (if applicable)
  • Scanned Copy of Ex-Servicemen Certificates (if applicable)
  • Scanned Copy of PwBD Certificates (if applicable)
  • Scanned Copy of LT Permit under IE rules for Mines or 440-550 Volts mining parts permit issued by Competent Authority (if applicable)
  • Scanned Copy of Minimum 01 Year Training/On-the-Job Practical Experience Certificate (if applicable)
  • Details of Debit Card/Credit Card/Net Banking for Fee Payment
  • Scanned Copy of Recent Photograph (not more than 3 weeks old, jpg/jpeg format)
  • Scanned Copy of Signature with Black Ink Pen (jpg/jpeg format)

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Coal India Limited (CIL) has published the Management Trainee (MT) E-1 Grade Notification 2026 on 05 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 660 MT positions across 9 disciplines. Candidates within the age range of up to 30 years for General category and holding a regular full-time Engineering/M.Tech/M.Sc./MCA degree in the relevant discipline with minimum qualifying marks are eligible to apply online at www.coalindia.in. The application process will be active from 12 May 2026 to 11 June 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and apply online link below.

FOLLOW US

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Coal India Limited (CIL) - a Schedule 'A' Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under Ministry of Coal, Government of India - has officially released Advertisement No. 03/2026 dated 05.05.2026 for recruitment to 660 posts of Management Trainee (MT) in E-1 Grade across 9 disciplines. CIL is the single largest coal producing company in the world, contributing around 75% of total coal production in India, with a manpower of approximately 2.12 Lakhs. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, selection process, examination syllabus, fee, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the official CIL website under the "Career with CIL" tab.

  • Download Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF (Advertisement No. 03/2026)

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name Coal India Limited (CIL), Corporate Headquarters, Kolkata (A Maharatna PSU under Ministry of Coal, Govt. of India)
Advertisement No. 03/2026, dated 05.05.2026
Post Name Management Trainee (MT)
Grade E-1 Grade
Pay Scale Rs. 60,000 - 1,80,000/- (Initial Basic Pay: Rs. 60,000/- per month during training period) + DA, HRA, Perquisites & Allowances under cafeteria approach including PRP
Total Vacancies 660 Posts (including 13 Backlog Vacancies; 64 vacancies reserved for PwD on horizontal basis)
Application Mode Online only (via CIL website - www.coalindia.in under Career with CIL >>>> Jobs at Coal India)
Selection Mode Computer Based Online Test (CBT) only - No Interview
Training Period 1 Year Training cum Probation. On successful completion, confirmed in E-1 Grade as Officer (Discipline).
Service Agreement Bond Rs. 3 Lakhs bond; minimum service of 60 months. Rs. 5,000/- per month deducted from salary, refunded without interest after 60 months.
Official Website https://www.coalindia.in

Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date & Time
Opening Date for Online Registration of Applications 12-05-2026 (from 10:00 Hrs)
Last Date of Online Submission of Applications 11-06-2026 (by 18:00 Hrs)
Computer Based Test (CBT) Date To be intimated through Admit Card (downloadable via individual login portal)
Upper Age Limit Calculated As On 30-04-2026
EWS Certificate Validity (Income / Assets) Based on income of FY 2025-26; valid for year 2026-27
OBC-NCL Certificate Issue Date On or after 01-04-2026

Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 660 vacancies (647 Fresh + 13 Backlog) have been announced for the post of Management Trainee in E-1 Grade across 9 disciplines. These are distributed across UR, EWS, SC, ST, and OBC-NCL categories. A total of 64 vacancies are reserved for PwD candidates on a horizontal basis (including PwD backlog vacancies of previous recruitments). The above vacancy is tentative and may increase or decrease as per requirement.

Discipline Post Code Total Vacancies
Civil 11 178
Electrical 12 221
Mechanical 13 145
System (IT/CS) 14 43
Electronics & Communication (E&T) 15 38
Geology 16 15
Industrial Engineering 17 11
Rajbhasha (Hindi) 18 05
Company Secretary 19 04
Total   660

*Total 64 vacancies are reserved for PwD candidates (horizontal basis) which includes backlog vacancies of PwD from previous recruitments. **The above vacancy is tentative and may increase or decrease as per requirement.

Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of online submission of applications (11-06-2026). Admission to the Computer Based Online Test will be purely provisional. Engineering Degree/M.Tech/M.Sc./MCA must be of regular full-time course from a University/Institute recognized by the appropriate statutory authority in India. For calculating aggregate final marks, the aggregate marks of all years/semesters/trimesters would be taken. Rounding of percentage will not be acceptable; even 59.99% will not be treated as eligible. Final year/semester/trimester students of academic year 2025-26 who expect their results by 31.08.2026 are also eligible to apply.

Discipline-wise Minimum Qualification

Post Code Discipline Minimum Qualification Eligible Branches
11 Civil Degree in the relevant branch of Engineering with minimum 60% marks Civil Engineering; Civil Engineering with any combination (words "Civil or Civil Engineering" must precede in Nomenclature of Course)
12 Electrical Degree in the relevant branch of Engineering with minimum 60% marks Electrical Engineering; Electronics & Electrical Engineering; Electrical Engineering with any combination (words "Electrical or Electrical Engineering" must precede)
13 Mechanical Degree in the relevant branch of Engineering with minimum 60% marks Mechanical Engineering; Mining Machinery; Mechanical Engineering with any combination (words "Mechanical or Mechanical Engineering" must precede)
14 System Recognized 1st Class Degree in BE/B.Tech/B.Sc (Engg.) in Computer Science/Computer Engineering/I.T OR any 1st Class Degree with MCA Computer Science / Computer Engineering / Information Technology / MCA
15 E&T (Electronics & Telecommunication) BE/B.Tech/B.Sc (Engg.) in relevant branch of Engineering with minimum 60% marks Electronics & Telecommunication; Electronics & Communication; Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering; Electronics Instrumentation and Control Engineering
16 Geology M.Sc./M.Tech. in Geology or Applied Geology or Geophysics or Applied Geophysics with minimum 60% marks Geology / Applied Geology / Geophysics / Applied Geophysics
17 Industrial Engineering Degree in the relevant branch of Engineering with minimum 60% marks Industrial Engineering; Industrial Engineering and Management; Industrial Engineering and Production Engineering; Production and Industrial Engineering; Industrial Engineering and Operation Research
18 Rajbhasha (Hindi) MA in Hindi with minimum 60% marks AND Graduation with Hindi and English as main subjects with 50% marks Hindi (degree through online/correspondence/ODL is also recognized if recognized by relevant statutory bodies for Central Govt. employment)
19 Company Secretary Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute having acquired Company Secretary qualification with Associate/Fellow membership of ICSI. Preference to candidates who have worked in a listed Company. Any discipline graduation + CS qualification (Associate/Fellow member of ICSI)

Minimum Qualifying Marks

Category Minimum Qualifying Marks
General (UR) / OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) / EWS 60% (even 59.99% is not eligible; no rounding)
SC / ST / Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) 55% (5% relaxation in minimum qualifying marks)

Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

The upper age limit is 30 years as on 30th April 2026 for General (UR) and EWS category candidates. Age relaxation is applicable to reserved category candidates as per Government of India guidelines. The upper age limit under any category shall not exceed 56 years as on 30-04-2026. There is no age bar for permanent employees of Coal India Limited and its subsidiaries.

Category Upper Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) / EWS 30 years (as on 30-04-2026)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (33 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (35 years)
PwD - General (UR) 10 years relaxation (40 years)
PwD - OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 13 years relaxation (43 years)
PwD - SC / ST 15 years relaxation (45 years)
Ex-Servicemen (ESM) As per extant Govt. of India guidelines
Employees of Coal India Limited and its Subsidiaries No age bar
Maximum age under any circumstance (as on 30-04-2026) 56 years

Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Candidates belonging to General (UR)/OBC (Creamy Layer & Non-Creamy Layer)/EWS category are required to pay a non-refundable fee. SC/ST/PwBD candidates and Employees of Coal India Limited and its Subsidiaries are exempted from payment of application fee. Application fee will be paid through online mode only. Fee once paid will not be refunded or adjusted against any further recruitment activity under any circumstances. CIL does not seek any other charges/fees except the application fee mentioned in this advertisement.

Category Application Fee
General (UR) / OBC (Creamy Layer & Non-Creamy Layer) / EWS Rs. 1,000/- + GST Rs. 180/- = Rs. 1,180/- (Rupees One Thousand One Hundred Eighty only) - Non-Refundable
SC / ST / PwBD / Employees of CIL and its Subsidiaries NIL (Exempted)

Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for CIL MT Recruitment 2026 consists of a Computer Based Online Test (CBT) only. There will be NO interview for final selection. The CBT will be of 3 hours duration (in one sitting) consisting of two papers of 100 marks each. Paper-I covers General Knowledge/Awareness, Reasoning, Numerical Ability and General English. Paper-II covers Professional Knowledge (Discipline related). Each question carries 1 mark and there is NO penalty for wrong answers. No marks will be awarded for un-attempted questions. The question paper will be bilingual (English and Hindi); in case of any error in Hindi version, the English version will be valid and final.

Candidates may opt for three Test Cities in order of preference (cannot be changed after submission). CIL reserves the right to allocate any Test City other than opted and to add/delete cities based on applicant numbers.

Computer Based Online Test (CBT) Structure

Paper Subject No. of Questions Marks
Paper I General Knowledge/Awareness + Reasoning + Numerical Ability + General English 100 MCQs 100
Paper II Professional Knowledge (Discipline / Subject related) 100 MCQs 100
Total Duration 3 Hours (in one sitting) | No Negative Marking

Qualifying Marks in CBT

Category Minimum Qualifying Marks (in each paper)
General (UR) / EWS Minimum 40 marks in each paper
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Minimum 35 marks in each paper
SC / ST / PwD Minimum 30 marks in each paper

Tie-Breaking Rule

Company Secretary (CS) Discipline Tie-Break Preference to candidates who have worked in a Listed Company

How to Apply for Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted through online mode available on CIL website www.coalindia.in only, under Career with CIL >>>> Jobs at Coal India section. No hard copy of the application form or any documents should be sent to the CIL office. Candidates can submit online application for one discipline (post) only. No modifications are allowed after the candidate submits the online application form. Candidates are advised not to wait till the last date and submit their application well within time.

The Admit Card for CBT will be available for downloading through the individual login portal on the CIL website. All correspondences/announcements will be made through CIL website www.coalindia.in only. Candidates must have an active email ID and mobile number valid for at least the next one year. For queries, candidates may refer to the FAQs section on the CIL website or write to Email: [email protected].

Documents to be Uploaded with Online Application (Self-attested, in PDF format unless specified):

  • Recent passport-size colour photograph (not older than 3 weeks; in jpg/jpeg format)
  • Signature with Black ink pen (in jpg/jpeg format)
  • Copy of Matriculation/Secondary Board level certificate (as age/DOB proof)
  • Marksheets of all semesters/trimesters/years of graduation/post-graduation in a single PDF
  • Final/Provisional Degree/Certificate for Graduation and Post-Graduation (as applicable)
  • Final year students: all marksheets up to latest semester/year/trimester
  • Company Secretary certificate/Associate Member certificate/Fellow Member certificate of ICSI (for Post Code 19)
  • Experience certificate of working in listed company (for CS discipline candidates - preference)
  • CGPA/GPA to percentage conversion certificate issued by University/Institute (if applicable)
  • Valid Caste Certificate in prescribed format (for OBC-NCL/SC/ST candidates)
  • PwBD Certificate in Govt. of India prescribed format + UDID Card issued by competent authority (if applicable)
  • Valid Income & Asset Certificate for EWS (based on FY 2025-26 income; valid for 2026-27)
  • Discharge/Service Certificate (for Ex-Servicemen)
  • No Objection Certificate (NOC) for candidates presently employed in Govt./PSU/Semi-Govt./Autonomous body

Apply Online at: https://www.coalindia.in (under Career with CIL >>>> Jobs at Coal India)

Important Instructions for Coal India Limited MT Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply.
  • Engineering Degree/M.Tech/M.Sc./MCA must be from a recognized University/Institute and must be a regular full-time course; no online/correspondence/part-time courses (except Hindi for Rajbhasha discipline).
  • Rounding of percentage is not acceptable; 60% means 60.00% and above only; even 59.99% is not eligible.
  • Final year/semester students of academic year 2025-26 are eligible if they expect results by 31.08.2026; minimum marks criteria applies to completed semesters.
  • A candidate can submit online application for one discipline (post) only; if multiple applications are submitted, only the application with the higher Application Sequence Number will be entertained.
  • OBC-NCL certificate must be issued on or after 01-04-2026 in the latest prescribed format applicable for Central Govt. PSU appointment.
  • EWS Income & Asset Certificate must be based on income of FY 2025-26 and valid for the year 2026-27.
  • No TA/DA will be paid to any candidate (including SC/ST/PwD/EWS) for appearing in the Computer Based Online Test.
  • Candidates working in Govt./PSUs/Autonomous bodies must submit NOC at the time of online application or DV/IME or submit proper relieving order at the time of joining.
  • Selected candidates will be required to execute a service agreement bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs and must serve for a minimum period of 60 months; Rs. 5,000/- per month will be deducted from salary towards bond money, refunded without interest after 60 months.
  • Canvassing in any form shall disqualify candidature. CIL does not demand any fee other than the application fee; do not respond to fraudulent agents.
  • All notices, selection list, etc. will be uploaded only on CIL website under the tab "Career with CIL". Candidates are advised to visit the website regularly.
  • Any dispute with regard to recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Kolkata only.
